reviews.text: Had a great experience working with Gemma - Excellent communication throughout.
reviews.name: Lead D365 Business Central Solution Architect
reviews.role: Lead D365 Business Central Solution Architect | April 2026

reviews.text:
To say it's been a pleasure working with GTP Tech Recruitment is an understatement. I've worked with a lot of recruiters but what differentiated Gemma is how much she cares. She supported me consistently through the entire process and it genuinely felt like she was working with my best interests at heart.

For me Gemma stands out from the rest and I can unequivocally say I'm so pleased to have worked with her to find my most recent role.
reviews.name: Senior Microsoft Solution Architect

reviews.text:
Just wanted to say a huge thank you, Gemma, for the candidate you put forward - genuinely one of the strongest people we've come across in the Microsoft space.

It was really clear how well you understood what we were looking for. The candidate had an excellent grasp of the Microsoft stack, but more importantly, they were able to talk confidently about how the technology translates into real business outcomes, not just technical theory.

What stood out most was how well aligned they were with both our requirements and our culture. That doesn't happen by chance, and it reflects the time and care you'd clearly taken to match the right person to the role, rather than just sending over a CV.

It was a great piece of recruitment work and definitely reinforced why we enjoy working with you. Based on the quality of this candidate alone, we'd have no hesitation in coming back to you for future Microsoft-focused roles.
reviews.name: Head of Microsoft BizApps Sales

reviews.text:
I honestly can't recommend Gemma enough. From the start she really listened and took the time to understand my background and what I was actually looking for. She didn't just send over loads of random roles, she was selective and only put me forward for positions that genuinely made sense for my experience and where I wanted to go next.

She was always on hand throughout the whole process, keeping me up to date, checking I had what I needed and giving me honest advice. What has stood out the most is that even now I'm settled into the role she still checks in. It's clear she genuinely cares about the people she works with and really enjoys what she does, and that makes a big difference.

Really grateful for her support and wouldn't hesitate to recommend her to anyone.
reviews.name: Microsoft BizApps Sales Specialist

reviews.text:
I'd like to recommend Gemma for the support and guidance she consistently provides throughout the process. 
Gemma makes sure that you are always fully up to date—clearly outlining next steps, timelines, and expectations. One of Gemma's standout qualities is how well-connected she is. 

She doesn't just support you through the process, she actively helps expand your professional network by making thoughtful introductions and linking you with the right people at the right time. This added a huge amount of value and makes the experience of working and staying connected with Gemma even more impactful.
reviews.name: AI & Workplace Transformation Consultant

reviews.text: Cannot recommend Gemma enough - she is excellent at her craft. So personable, attentive and really made me feel like I wasn't alone throughout the recruitment process. From promptly answering whatsapp messages, to offering her time to let me practice my interview task, Gemma really supported me end-to-end. Super positive experience - a joy to work with.
reviews.name: Senior Marketing Manager

reviews.text:
I had the pleasure of working with Gemma Peck during my recent job application process, and I can confidently say that her support made all the difference. From our very first interaction, Gemma was incredibly professional, approachable, and genuinely invested in helping me succeed.

She kept me informed at every stage, provided valuable insights about the role and company, and made sure I was fully prepared for each step of the process. Her communication was always clear, timely, and encouraging — exactly what any candidate hopes for in a recruiter.

Thanks to her guidance and support, I felt confident and well-equipped throughout the journey. Gemma is not just a recruiter — she's a true partner in the process, and any candidate would be lucky to have her in their corner. I highly recommend Gemma to anyone looking for a recruiter who combines professionalism with a personal touch. She's outstanding at what she does.
reviews.name: D365 Business Central Consultant

reviews.text:
I had the pleasure of liaising with Gemma regarding a position that was available. Gemma has been very personable and approachable, communication with her was very easy, she always took the time to listen to me and understand my requirements as well as worries.

She kept me informed throughout the process and ensured I was comfortable and all my needs were answered to. I would highly recommend Gemma especially if you are looking into the Microsoft space such as Dynamics365.

Thank you, Gemma for believing in me and helping me out with everything. You've been phenomenal!
reviews.name: Power Platform Consultant & Engineer

reviews.text:
We had a fantastic experience working with Gemma on our recent hiring process. From the outset, she demonstrated a deep understanding of our business and took the time to really listen to what we needed, not just in terms of the role, but the gaps we were trying to fill in our team and the kind of person who would thrive in our culture.

Gemma's communication was faultless throughout. Gemma kept us updated at every stage, ensuring we were always in the loop, whether it was progress on sourcing, changes in candidate requirements, or feedback from interviews. We always felt like we were in control, with no surprises.

What stood out most was her commitment to quality over quantity. Gemma didn't flood us with CVs, Gemma filtered carefully, brought us the right people, and ultimately helped us find the perfect fit. We wouldn't hesitate to work with Gemma again and would wholeheartedly recommend her to anyone serious about building a high-performing team.
reviews.name: Managing Director

reviews.text:
Gemma contacted me about a couple of potential roles that matched my skillset & it was perfect timing! We had a great initial conversation & she understood where I was, how I was feeling & where I wanted to be.

The interviews were set up quickly & Gemma kept in touch throughout. She kept me updated (although not in an overbearing, persistent way) & she wished me good luck before each interview. She got answers to all of my questions & was SO happy to be the one to tell me that I was being made an offer!

I really felt that Gemma was in my corner & I wouldn't hesitate to recommend her (& I already have several times!) Thanks so much Gemma, it's been an absolute pleasure & I hope we'll stay in touch.
reviews.name: Power Platform & Dynamics 365 Architect

reviews.text:
It's been a very nice experience to be recruited and to go through the recruitment process together with Gemma Peck from GTP Tech Recruitment. I need to mention, not in the last place, that our collaboration ended with success and I found a good job that offered me what I needed and what I expected.

In our journey together I felt supported in a very professional, but also friendly and very helpful way. There was nothing to know that I wasn't told and nothing to be advised that I got no advise from Gemma.

I highly recommend Gemma's services and GTP Tech Recruitment. I was informed all the way, I had helpful feedback, support and reminders. It was the best recruitment experience that I had until now. I am thankful and grateful that I had the chance to go through this experience together with Gemma and I will recommend her to all people interested.
reviews.name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&SCM Senior Consultant
reviews.role: Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&SCM Senior Consultant | March 2025

reviews.text:
Working with Gemma to secure my new role was incredible, she is an exceptional individual, always on the end of the phone when you need her and also showed genuine want to support and help throughout the entire process.

I managed to land a role in an exciting organisation in a totally new sector for me with Gemma's support and guidance and I am so grateful for her help - she also helped me navigate some tricky conversations and feelings when the offer came in which really made me feel at ease with my choices.

It has been an absolute pleasure being supported by Gemma.
reviews.name: Microsoft Growth Marketing

reviews.text:
We had the pleasure of working with Gemma to fill our Marketing Manager vacancy, and we couldn't be more impressed. From the outset, she was incredibly responsive and proactive, ensuring a smooth and efficient hiring process.

Gemma provided us with a high calibre of candidates, demonstrating a clear understanding of our needs and the role's requirements. Her timely engagement and consistent communication meant we were always well-informed, making decision-making seamless.

Thanks to her expertise and dedication, we successfully secured a fantastic new team member. We highly recommend Gemma to anyone looking for a recruiter who truly delivers.
reviews.name: Head of Marketing

reviews.text:
Gemma has been a fantastic partner in helping us recruit two new Microsoft BizApps Sales Specialists. The calibre of candidates she introduced was superb, demonstrating her deep understanding of our needs and the Microsoft partner ecosystem.

Her responsiveness and professionalism throughout the process have been first-class, ensuring a smooth and efficient experience. If you're looking for a recruiter who delivers top talent with exceptional service, I highly recommend Gemma.
reviews.name: Sales and Marketing Director

reviews.text:
Gemma is nothing less than exceptional. I was a recruitment consultant myself, and now I'm looking forward to my new role—all thanks to Gemma. She has guided me through the whole process efficiently and effectively and has put all recruiters to shame with her skill.

It's hard to come across people who genuinely want to see you do well, and Gemma is one of those people. She has prepped me and coached me thoroughly throughout the entire process, and all I can say is a big thank you.
reviews.name: Business Development Representative

reviews.text:
Gemma reached out to me for a role in tech sales and was brilliantly able to match my experience and skills to a high quality role. She was proactive in providing information and did so accurately. She was also always on hand to offer guidance ahead of interviews and presentations.

She collected feedback from the employer well, which helped me to understand their decision process and adapt accordingly. Beyond being very good at her job, she was also lovely to deal with and was sincerely happy for me when I landed the job.

Gemma, it was a pleasure to work with you. All the best for the future!
reviews.name: Sales Professional

reviews.text:
Gemma was exceptional throughout the process of securing my latest job. Her availability and responsiveness made the experience seamless, and her proficiency in understanding my career goals and what I was looking for was truly reassuring.

She consistently followed up, provided valuable feedback and encouragement, and ensured everything went smoothly. I highly recommend her!
reviews.name: Microsoft Power Platform & SharePoint Specialist
reviews.role: Microsoft Power Platform & SharePoint Specialist | Jan 2025

reviews.text:
Gemma is the most wonderful recruiter, she did such a great job of working with me to balance my needs as well as the company she was representing, creating a safe space for me to express my feedback.

She really cares about the people and the companies she is representing, a breath of fresh air when it comes to recruiters.
reviews.name: Experienced Project Manager

reviews.text:
Gemma was fantastic to work with during my application process. She was always on hand to answer questions and was great leading up to and after each stage of the interview providing useful prep and feedback.

Thank you!
reviews.name: Digital Transformation & AI Strategy Leader
reviews.role: Digital Transformation & AI Strategy Leader | July 2024

reviews.text:
Gemma did a fantastic job with one of our Pre-Sales Architect positions. She really got to understand both our business and the specific role and along with that an excellent cultural fit.

I'd recommend using Gemma and her team!
reviews.name: Managing Director

reviews.text:
Gemma reviewed my profile and previous working experience on LI, she provided full scale screening at initial interview and decided to move forward with my profile. Throughout several rounds of interviews and exams Gemma remained a valuable component, keeping me fully informed about the process and next steps.

Her professional and positive attitude turned all recruitment challenges into quick wins for me. She provided valuable advice and guidance, helping me be fully prepared during in business cases and presenting my relevant experience and gave many value add insights which helped with my decision making.

If you're looking for a new role in the Microsoft Dynamics space Gemma is definitely the expert to help!
reviews.name: Experienced IT Project Manager

reviews.text:
It was so nice and comfortable talking with Gemma during the process of finding my new job opportunity. She was very caring and helped me find the best fit for me.

She always asked me how the interviews went and I felt very accompanied. Thanks for everything Gemma!!
reviews.name: Dynamics 365 F&O SCM Consultant

reviews.text:
Gemma acted as a recruiter for me as a candidate. Very professional, quick and to the point, she helped me communicate with the company, quickly informed me about the process and helped me at the final stage in communicating with HR.

Thank you for the excellent work and high professionalism
reviews.name: Dynamics 365 FnO Architect

reviews.text:
I recommend Gemma as a very professional recruiter. Quick reaction times and uncomplicated process.

She helped me to get a new job in Australia and it worked out very well!
reviews.name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&O Solution Architect
reviews.role: Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&O Solution Architect | May 2023

reviews.text: Thanks to Gemma's help I was able to secure a great new position.
reviews.name: Power Platform Developer

reviews.text:
I have been working with GTP Tech Recruitment for over a year. They have produced excellent results placing several outstanding candidates in the company. They have provided an incredible service to work with me as a genuine recruitment partner to help build the business in a hyper-growth phase internationally.

I found them very refreshing to work with over other recruitment agencies because they listen to what we need and deliver the results. It is evident by their work that GTP Tech is specialised in the field of Recruitment for IT Consultancy, specialising in the Microsoft Dynamics space.

They have a strong network of candidates, which shows in the quality of the profiles they send and the people they place within the business. They provide exceptional customer service. I highly recommend and look forward to a long business partnership with them.
reviews.name: Internal Recruitment Consultant
